_note: Diátaxis classification for docs-reindex.mjs (ADR-0030). Maps each doc (path relative to docs/) to a mode: tutorials | how-to | reference | explanation. ROADMAP.md + CHANGELOG.md are auto-listed under Planning & meta. Edit + run /docs-reindex to regenerate docs/README.md. The `architecture/` bucket groups system-shape docs; the script classifies them as `explanation` (the canonical Diátaxis mode for understanding-oriented content).
